prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DUKCS-52PC-A-4 Product Type: UTILITY_KNIFE Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 52pc Deluxe Cutting Knife Set with Molded Hard Case, Assorted Precision Utility Knife Blades and Handles Complete Set Description: Take control of precision cutting, crafting, hobby work, and detailed projects with the 52pc Deluxe Precision Cutting Knife Set with Molded Hard Case. Designed for makers, artists, hobbyists, DIYers, and professionals alike, this complete utility knife kit delivers versatility, accuracy, and convenience in one organized solution. Whether you're working on model building, crafting, vinyl cutting, scrapbooking, wood carving, paper trimming, leather work, or detailed repair projects, this all-in-one precision knife set gives you the tools you need to cut cleaner and work smarter.

Inside the durable molded hard case, you’ll find a wide variety of interchangeable precision blades and ergonomic handles engineered for control and balance. The assortment of blade shapes allows users to tackle fine detail cuts, scoring, trimming, carving, and delicate shaping with confidence. From beginners learning detailed craft techniques to experienced hobbyists needing a reliable cutting solution, this kit provides flexibility without sacrificing performance.

Each blade is designed for sharp, accurate cutting across common materials such as paper, cardboard, plastic, foam board, thin wood, vinyl, leather, and more. The included handles feature textured grips that help reduce hand fatigue while improving stability during extended use. The compact hard case keeps tools organized, protected, and easy to transport between workspaces, studios, classrooms, or job sites.

Perfect for hobby kits, art studios, crafting stations, model making benches, or DIY tool collections, the 52pc Deluxe Precision Knife Set delivers professional-level versatility at an accessible value. Whether you’re upgrading your existing toolkit or starting fresh with a complete cutting solution, this precision knife kit is built to help you create with accuracy and confidence. Search Terms: precision hobby tool kit exacto style cutter model making supplies craft carving tools art knife replacement blades detail trimming vinyl weeding kit scrapbooking accessories foam board cutter leather craft tools stencil cutter diy repair tools miniature modeling supplies artist hobby equipment beginners craft set Features: - A blade for every task; knife hobby set with precision cutter blades for crafts - Includes: 7 Knife handles, 37 Unique blades, 5 Prove blades, 1 Sharpening stone ,1 Glue, 1 Carrying case - Hard shell case for storage; Each piece has its own location for easy organization - Great for craft starters or experienced hobbyists! === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 52pc Deluxe Precision Cutting Knife Set
